title: Violations; penalty
doc_html:
§1907.  Violations; penalty

Whoever violates the provisions of this Part shall be fined not more than one hundred dollars, or imprisoned for not more than ninety days, or by both.

§1907.  Violations; penalty
Whoever violates the provisions of this Part shall be fined not more than one hundred dollars, or imprisoned for not more than ninety days, or by both.
